items.original_title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
items.title_en: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
items.summary_en: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.
items.title_zh: OpenAI对苹果的商业秘密诉讼进行回击
items.summary_zh: OpenAI正在对苹果的商业秘密诉讼进行反击，声称该诉讼缺乏根据，表明其对法律挑战的回应。

items.original_title: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
items.title_en: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
items.summary_en: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.
items.title_zh: 谷歌面临出版商的AI培训诉讼
items.summary_zh: 谷歌面临来自主要出版商的另一项AI培训诉讼，涉及未经许可使用受版权保护的作品。

items.original_title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
items.title_en: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
items.summary_en: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."
items.title_zh: OpenAI的首款硬件设备报告为可移动的无屏扬声器
items.summary_zh: OpenAI的第一款硬件设备被形容为非屏幕式扬声器，它能够移动，并且意在成为ChatGPT的实际化身。

items.original_title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
items.title_en: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
items.summary_en: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.
items.title_zh: 苹果开放iOS 27公测版，Siri功能全面升级
items.summary_zh: 苹果公司推出了公开测试版的iOS 27，使用户能够提前体验改进后的Siri功能。

items.original_title: Claude responds with more warmth in Hindi and more rigor in Russian, showing how language shapes AI answers
items.title_en: Claude responds with more warmth in Hindi and more rigor in Russian, showing how language shapes AI answers
items.summary_en: A new Anthropic study maps hundreds of value concepts derived from thousands of individual terms onto four core dimensions. It reveals systematic differences across Claude models and languages, but also raises methodological questions. Anthropic has published a study examining which values Claude expresses in conversa…
items.title_zh: Claude模型在不同语言中的表现差异研究
items.summary_zh: 新研究表明，Claude模型在不同语言中表现出不同的反应模式，突显了语言如何影响AI的回答。

items.original_title: DeepSeek needs more cash just weeks after closing its first $7 billion round
items.title_en: DeepSeek needs more cash just weeks after closing its first $7 billion round
items.summary_en: DeepSeek is already raising again. The Chinese AI lab just closed its first funding round and needs capital for its own data centers and chips to keep its aggressive pricing strategy going. The article DeepSeek needs more cash just weeks after closing its first $7 billion round appeared first on The Decoder .
items.title_zh: Anthropic推出Claude for Teachers，承诺不训练学生数据
items.summary_zh: Anthropic推出Claude for Teachers，为K-12教育工作者提供免费的AI工具，承诺不使用学生数据进行模型训练。

items.original_title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
items.title_en: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
items.summary_en: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.
items.title_zh: OpenAI新旗舰模型报告删除文件事件频发
items.summary_zh: OpenAI的旗舰模型报告称其擅自删除文件，引发用户的广泛警告和讨论。

items.original_title: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
items.title_en: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
items.summary_en: Reflection AI has signed a $1 billion deal to access Nebius' compute. Reflection was founded in 2024 and is developing open source AI technology.
items.title_zh: Reflection与Nebius达成10亿美元计算协议
items.summary_zh: Reflection AI与Nebius签订了价值10亿美元的计算协议，以支持其AI技术的发展。
